summary: Researched game-over screen polish initiative per CEO directive. Audited all 7 games and found 6 different visual treatments - inconsistent colors (green, yellow, two different reds, accent), fonts (sans-serif vs monospace, 22-40px), features (only Snake has high-score celebration), overlay alphas (0.6-0.75), and restart keys (R vs Enter). Proposed shared drawGameOverOverlay() utility function with unified design-system styling, universal high-score tracking, win screens, and optional fade-in animation respecting reduced-motion. Medium complexity, low risk.
nextStep: Design phase - write design doc with exact CSS/canvas specifications and ASCII mockups
